name: Chia Seeds
description: Tiny but mighty — packed with omega-3, calcium and fibre. Add to smoothies, yogurt or just snack on them.

name: Flax Seeds
description: A daily wellness staple — rich in lignans, omega-3 fatty acids and dietary fibre. Great for digestion.

name: Pumpkin Seeds
description: Crunchy, nutty and ridiculously good for you. High in zinc, magnesium and plant protein.

name: Sunflower Seeds
description: Light, crunchy and loaded with Vitamin E and healthy fats. The perfect on-the-go snack.

name: Watermelon Seeds
description: Don't spit them out — eat them! High in protein, iron and magnesium. A surprisingly powerful seed.

name: Muskmelon Seeds
description: Mild, creamy and nutrient-dense. Rich in antioxidants and immunity-boosting vitamins.

name: Edamame
description: Young soybeans roasted to perfection — a satisfying, high-protein snack that keeps you full longer.

name: Black Raisins
description: Naturally sweet and iron-rich. Great for energy, skin health and keeping mid-day cravings in check.

name: Cranberry
description: Tart, chewy and packed with antioxidants. Brilliant in trail mixes, oatmeal or straight from the bag.

name: Blueberry
description: Nature's brain food. Bursting with antioxidants and phytoflavonoids — your daily dose of wellness.
